13e1913568fd.artifacts: None of note in either panel. The caption lies over a solid black letterbox band, so both fill pure black. No halo, no block edge, no window seam, no global softening or color shift; the grayscale wall content below is essentially pixel-identical to the original in both LaMa and MiniMax.
13e1913568fd.note: Text overlays a pure black band (no real background behind it), so both LaMa and MiniMax remove it completely and identically, leaving the scene untouched.

25f3d4bd75de.artifacts: LaMa (middle): faint reddish/green chroma speckles in the upper-center forehead where the first text line sat — minor residual inpaint noise; otherwise natural skin, no halo/seam/block edge. MiniMax (right): mild softening of the reconstructed skin (slightly blurrier) plus a faint smudge on the left forehead; no chroma specks. Neither panel shows a window seam, hard block edge, halo, or global color shift — non-masked regions (cheek, background) are pixel-identical between the two and match the original.
25f3d4bd75de.note: The caption lies entirely on flat forehead skin, so both methods fully erase the text with no real background structure to differentiate; LaMa leaves faint chroma specks while MiniMax is a touch soft, but the differences are marginal.

3abeca2e0204.artifacts: LaMa: faint bluish haze/foggy patch in the caption-band center, visible only under ~6x brightening. MiniMax: none; fill is a marginally cleaner/darker black. No halo, block edge, window seam, global softening, or color shift in either panel at normal brightness; image content below the band is identical between the two.
3abeca2e0204.note: Caption sits on a solid black letterbox bar, so both fully remove the text over black with no real structure to preserve or smear; the only difference is LaMa's faint bluish haze under strong brightening vs MiniMax's cleaner black, negligible at normal viewing.

4520783daa95.artifacts: Neither panel shows meaningful artifacts in the caption band: no halo, block edge, window seam, or global color shift, and the dark-to-jersey transition is smooth in both. 4520783daa95.note: The caption sits over featureless dark out-of-focus crowd, so both methods fully erase the text with clean, near-identical dark reconstructions and there is no real structure for either to preserve or smear.

4524f14810ff.artifacts: None in either panel's caption band. 4524f14810ff.note: Text lies on the black letterbox with no background structure behind it, so both models remove it perfectly and there is nothing for either to preserve or smear — a clean tie on this frame.

46f82f8d9ce1.artifacts: LaMa: foggy dark smear/blur in the right caption zone where the woman's hanging forearm and hand were — the hand is blurred away into a soft dark patch. 48f587e6637e.note: Both fully remove the caption across dirt and jacket with no leftover text and no artifacts; the featureless blurred background offers no detail for MiniMax to preserve nor for LaMa to smear, making them effectively indistinguishable on this frame.

4d32abcf2b06.artifacts: Negligible in both.
